experiment_title: 铁盐与氢氧化钠反应沉淀颜色观察实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="铁盐与氢氧化钠反应沉淀颜色观察实验" goal="比较FeCl₃和FeSO₄溶液与NaOH反应生成沉淀的颜色及变化，记录Fe(OH)₃和Fe(OH)₂的沉淀特征及Fe(OH)₂的氧化现象" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_holder_1" type="test_tube_holder" />
      <Component id="test_tube_holder_2" type="test_tube_holder" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_2" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_3" type="dropper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="FeCl3_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="FeSO4_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="NaOH_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Distilled_water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="test_tube_holder_1" id="step_0" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_2" support="test_tube_holder_2" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="FeCl3" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="FeSO4" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper_2" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="H2O" volume="5 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="H2O" volume="5 mL" tool="dropper_2" id="step_5" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="NaOH" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper_3" id="step_6" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_8" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="NaOH" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper_3" id="step_9" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_2" id="step_10" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_11" />
   </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 准备实验器材，将两支试管分别固定在试管架上，为后续加药做准备。
分别向两支试管中加入FeCl₃溶液和FeSO₄溶液，并用蒸馏水稀释，得到待反应的铁盐溶液。
向含FeCl₃的试管中加入NaOH溶液，搅拌并静置，观察Fe(OH)₃沉淀的颜色和特征。
向含FeSO₄的试管中加入NaOH溶液，搅拌并静置，观察Fe(OH)₂沉淀的颜色、特征及其氧化现象。
